Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Lim, Esq. 310-860-0770 of Shegerian & Associates for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Willie Williams, Esq. 909-581-8341 for Defendant Kecia Davidson.
Robert Matsuishi, Esq. 949-851-1100 of Payne & Fears for Defendant ABM BUILDING SOLUTIONS, LLC, ABM INDUSTRIES INC., LEE LOCKRIDGE, BRUCE WRIGHT, TOM BOWEN

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares its views. Plaintiff argues wet signature and eventually submit to the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT ABM BUILDING SOLUTIONS, LLC, ABM INDUSTRIES INC., LEE LOCKRIDGE, BRUCE WRIGHT, TOM BOWEN'S Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling. Defendants ABM Building Solutions, LLC, ABM Industries Inc., Lee Lockridge, Bruce Wright, and Tom Bowen's motion to compel arbitration of the claims asserted in plaintiff Milton Boone Birdsell's complaint is granted and the action is stayed pending conclusion of the arbitration proceedings. (see word minutes for full details)(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

An Order is signed for the 2 motions. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

MOTION / Joinder To Defendants' Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action
Off Calendar Jul-02-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mark Lim, Esq. 310-860-0770 of Shegerian & Associates for Plaintiff through Court Call.
Willie Williams, Esq. 909-581-8341 for Defendant Kecia Davidson.
Robert Matsuishi, Esq. 949-851-1100 of Payne & Fears for Defendant ABM BUILDING SOLUTIONS, LLC, ABM INDUSTRIES INC., LEE LOCKRIDGE, BRUCE WRIGHT, TOM BOWEN

RULING - A R G U E D. The Court shares its views. Plaintiff argues wet signature and eventually submit to the tentative ruling. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT KECIA DAVISON'S Joinder To Defendants' Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Defendant Kecia Davison's motion to compel arbitration is granted as stated in the court's ruling on defendants ABM Building Solutions, LLC, ABM Industries Inc., Lee Lockridge, Bruce Wright, and Tom Bowen's motion in which Ms. Davison joined.(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

An Order is signed for the 2 motions. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR#6185, tonyvaughn@yahoo.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
